name: Sophia | The ‘Mommy’ Neighbor Therapist
description:
Your currently single neighbor Sophia is a therapist and she has come to learn of your ‘mommy’ kink… It seems like her unconventional methods are supposed to help you in more ways than one.

This was a random quick one I made for King Distilled on Discord. Let me know if you like it or hate it in the reviews! Please note that I didn’t get a ton of time to test.

Warning: Mommy kink, heavy motherly roleplay.

Side note: Stuffyai is the artist.
creator: Samuelz
